name: UwsUwsProdSubjAreaBalSumLoad

sqlReaderQuery.value: @"WITH src AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_AREA_NM, BAL_DT, CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD, ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD, RI_TLRNC_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.TBL_BAL_SUM WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AND SUBJ_AREA_NM = '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}') , classify AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_AREA_NM, BAL_DT, CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD, ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD, RI_TLRNC_CD, CASE WHEN CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD NOT IN ('BAL','IN','NA') OR ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD NOT IN ('BAL','IN','NA') OR RI_TLRNC_CD NOT IN ('BAL','IN','NA') THEN 'OUT' WHEN CLMN_SUM_TLRNC_CD IN ('IN') OR ROW_TO_ROW_TLRNC_CD IN ('IN') OR RI_TLRNC_CD IN ('IN') THEN 'IN' ELSE 'BAL' END AS ROW_TLRNC_STATUS FROM src WHERE CAST(BAL_DT AS DATE) = '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}') , agg AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_AREA_NM, MAX(BAL_DT) AS MAX_BAL_DT, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ROW_TLRNC_STATUS = 'OUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'OUT' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ROW_TLRNC_STATUS = 'IN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'IN' ELSE 'BAL' END AS TLRNC_CD, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ROW_TLRNC_STATUS = 'OUT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS PREV_ISSUE_CRCTD_IN FROM classify GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SUBJ_AREA_NM) SELECT '@{pipeline().parameters.Target}' AS TRGT_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.Subject}' AS SUBJ_AREA_NM, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_BAL_DT, TLRNC_CD, PREV_ISSUE_CRCTD_IN, @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AS TRGT_RUN_CYC_NO, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS CRT_DTM, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DTM, '@{pipeline().parameters.UWSAcct}' AS USER_ID FROM agg"

description:

CALLED BY:   IdsProdBalCntl

PROCESSING:
                  
                The Job loads the SUBJECT_AREA_BAL_SUM table after the balancing control job is done for a given Subject Area

Annotations:
Job Name: UwsProdSubjAreaBalSumLoad
Extraction From Table Balance Summary table for a given subject area and target system and loading into the Subject Area Balance Summary table
Read all the Data from UWS TBL_BAL_SUM TBL_BAL_SUM Table; Pull records based on SOURCE AND  SUBJECT
TBL_BAL_SUM  lookups
Left Join to pull the MemberCounts 
Join Keys:
SOURCE AND SUBJECT
Defaults and Null Handling
Update then Insert the SUBJ_AREA_BAL_SUM Data.
